GROUP.noreg: No se encontraron registros para los filtros seleccionados.
No se encontraron registros de movimientos de stock.

qry:select.name: QRY_UNIFORME
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG16_UNIFORMES.oi_uniforme, ORG16_UNIFORMES.c_uniforme, ORG16_UNIFORMES.d_uniforme FROM ORG16_UNIFORMES WHERE ORG16_UNIFORMES.oi_uniforme = {#PARAM:@oi_uniforme} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT MAX(ORG16_UNIF_REC.f_recuento) as f_recuento, ORG16_UNIF_REC.e_cantidad as cant FROM ORG16_UNIF_REC WHERE ORG16_UNIF_REC.oi_uniforme = {#SOURCE:@oi_uniforme} AND ORG16_UNIF_REC.f_recuento <= {Datetime(#SOURCE:@f_desde)} GROUP BY ORG16_UNIF_REC.e_cantidad ORDER BY f_recuento ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SUM(PER02_UNIF_PER.e_cantidad) as cant FROM PER02_UNIF_PER WHERE PER02_UNIF_PER.oi_uniforme = {#SOURCE:@oi_uniforme} AND PER02_UNIF_PER.f_desde >= {Datetime(#SOURCE:@f_recuento)} AND PER02_UNIF_PER.f_desde <= {Datetime(#PARAMIN:@f_desde)} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2_1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SUM(PER02_DEV_UNIF.e_cantidad) as cant FROM PER02_DEV_UNIF, PER02_UNIF_PER JOIN PER02_DEV_UNIF.oi_uniforme_per INNER PER02_UNIF_PER.oi_uniforme_per WHERE PER02_DEV_UNIF.l_repone_stock = 1 AND PER02_UNIF_PER.oi_uniforme = {#SOURCE:@oi_uniforme} AND PER02_DEV_UNIF.f_dev_unif >= {Datetime(#SOURCE:@f_recuento)} AND PER02_DEV_UNIF.f_dev_unif <= {Datetime(#PARAMIN:@f_desde)} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SUM(ORG16_UNIF_REP.e_cant_repuesta) as cant FROM ORG16_UNIF_REP WHERE ORG16_UNIF_REP.oi_uniforme = {#SOURCE:@oi_uniforme} AND ORG16_UNIF_REP.f_reposicion >= {Datetime(#SOURCE:@f_recuento)} AND ORG16_UNIF_REP.f_reposicion <= {Datetime(#PARAMIN:@f_desde)} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: MOVIMIENTOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT UNIF_PER.f_desde as fecha, UNIF_PER.e_cantidad as cant, \'ENT\' as tipo, PER02.e_numero_legajo as legajo, PER01.d_ape_y_nom as apellido, \'Entrega\' as motivo, UNIF_PER.o_uniforme_per, PER37_MOT_ENTREGA.d_mot_entrega as d_motivo FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01, PER02_UNIF_PER AS UNIF_PER, PER37_MOT_ENTREGA JOIN PER02.oi_personal INNER PER01.oi_personal, PER02.oi_personal_emp INNER UNIF_PER.oi_personal_emp, UNIF_PER.oi_mot_entrega LEFT OUTER PER37_MOT_ENTREGA.oi_mot_entrega WHERE UNIF_PER.oi_uniforme = {#PARAM:@oi_uniforme} AND UNIF_PER.f_desde > {Datetime(#PARAM:@f_desde)} AND UNIF_PER.f_desde <= {Datetime(#PARAM:@f_hasta)} UNION SELECT PER02_DEV_UNIF.f_dev_unif as fecha, PER02_DEV_UNIF.e_cantidad as cant, \'DEV\' as tipo, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo as legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom as apellido, \'Devolución\' as motivo, PER02_UNIF_PER.o_uniforme_per, PER38_MOT_DEVOLUCION.d_mot_devolucion as d_motivo FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, PER02_UNIF_PER, PER02_DEV_UNIF, PER38_MOT_DEVOLUCION JOIN PER02_DEV_UNIF.oi_uniforme_per INNER PER02_UNIF_PER.oi_uniforme_per, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_UNIF_PER.oi_personal_emp, PER02_DEV_UNIF.oi_mot_devolucion LEFT OUTER PER38_MOT_DEVOLUCION.oi_mot_devolucion WHERE PER02_UNIF_PER.oi_uniforme = {#PARAM:@oi_uniforme} AND PER02_DEV_UNIF.f_dev_unif > {Datetime(#PARAM:@f_desde)} AND PER02_DEV_UNIF.f_dev_unif <= {Datetime(#PARAM:@f_hasta)} AND PER02_DEV_UNIF.l_repone_stock = 1 UNION SELECT ORG16_UNIF_REP.f_reposicion as fecha, ORG16_UNIF_REP.e_cant_repuesta as cant, \'REP\' as tipo, null as legajo, null as apellido, \'Reposición\' as motivo, null as o_uniforme_per, null as d_motivo FROM ORG16_UNIF_REP WHERE ORG16_UNIF_REP.oi_uniforme = {#PARAM:@oi_uniforme} AND ORG16_UNIF_REP.f_reposicion > {Datetime(#PARAM:@f_desde)} AND ORG16_UNIF_REP.f_reposicion <= {Datetime(#PARAM:@f_hasta)} UNION SELECT ORG16_UNIF_REC.f_recuento as fecha, ORG16_UNIF_REC.e_cantidad as cant, \'REC\' as tipo, null as legajo, null as apellido, \'Recuento\' as motivo, null as o_uniforme_per, null as d_motivo FROM ORG16_UNIF_REC WHERE ORG16_UNIF_REC.oi_uniforme = {#PARAM:@oi_uniforme} AND ORG16_UNIF_REC.f_recuento > {Datetime(#PARAM:@f_desde)} AND ORG16_UNIF_REC.f_recuento <= {Datetime(#PARAM:@f_hasta)} ORDER BY fecha ASC ')/ROWS/ROW
